events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Legendary Queen guitarist Brian May, known for his iconic sound and songwriting, celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Rock Legend's Birthday
angles.copy: The man behind some of the greatest guitar riffs in history, Queen's Brian May, is celebrating his 79th birthday today. What's your favourite Queen track?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: Sir Mick Jagger, the iconic frontman of The Rolling Stones and a rock and roll legend, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Jagger's Big Birthday
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young! The one and only Sir Mick Jagger, still rocking stages worldwide, celebrates his birthday today. What's your ultimate Stones anthem?

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: On this day in 1981, MTV launched, forever changing the music industry with its 24/7 music video format, kicking off with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'.

angles.name: Happy Birthday MTV
angles.copy: It's 45 years since MTV first hit our screens, revolutionising how we consumed music. Remember seeing 'Video Killed The Radio Star' for the very first time?

events.title: Oasis 'Definitely Maybe' anniversary
events.blurb: Oasis' seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' was released in 1994, propelling the Manchester band to superstardom.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: Thirty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed British music forever. What's your favourite track from this absolute classic?

events.title: Woodstock Festival 57th anniversary
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in counterculture history, began on this day in 1969, featuring iconic performances over three days.

angles.name: Remembering Woodstock
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago today, the Woodstock Festival kicked off, bringing together half a million people for '3 Days of Peace & Music'. An unforgettable moment in music history.

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: Remembering 'The King of Rock and Roll', Elvis Presley, who passed away on this day in 1977.

angles.name: Tribute to The King
angles.copy: Forty-nine years today since the world lost a true icon. Remembering the incomparable Elvis Presley and his enduring legacy.

events.title: Tupac Shakur shooting anniversary
events.blurb: On this day in 1996, legendary rapper Tupac Shakur was shot in Las Vegas, tragically dying six days later.

angles.name: Tupac Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering the impact of Tupac Shakur, who was shot in Las Vegas 30 years ago today, leading to his tragic death. His music still resonates.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death
events.blurb: Paying tribute to the legendary guitarist Jimi Hendrix, who tragically passed away on this day in 1970 at the age of 27.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix Remembered
angles.copy: Fifty-six years since we lost the extraordinary talent of Jimi Hendrix. His influence on music remains immeasurable.

events.title: The Beatles 'Abbey Road' anniversary
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic 'Abbey Road' album, featuring classic tracks like 'Something' and 'Here Comes the Sun', was released in 1969.

angles.name: Abbey Road Turns 57
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years today since The Beatles gave us the masterpiece that is 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is still one of the most famous in history!

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde, the formidable frontwoman of The Pretenders, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! Her voice and attitude with The Pretenders continue to inspire.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: The unmistakable voice of Oasis and a British rock icon, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Mad Fer It Birthday
angles.copy: Our kid's another year older! Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher. What's your favourite Liam moment?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' anniversary
events.blurb: John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine', a powerful call for peace and unity, marks another anniversary since its release.

angles.name: Imagine Endures
angles.copy: Fifty-one years since John Lennon released 'Imagine', a song that still resonates globally with its message of peace and hope.

events.title: First iPod launched 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple revolutionised portable music with the launch of its first iPod in 2001, putting '1,000 songs in your pocket'.

angles.name: iPod's Quarter Century
angles.copy: Can you believe it's 25 years since the original iPod dropped? It changed how we listened to music forever. Who still has theirs?

events.title: Happy James Bond Day!
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated globally as James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first 007 film, Dr. No, in 1962.

angles.name: Bond, James Bond Day
angles.copy: Grab your martini, shaken not stirred! It's James Bond Day, celebrating 64 years since Dr. No first hit screens. What's your favourite Bond theme tune?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering the visionary musician, songwriter, and peace activist John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the incredible life and music of John Lennon. His message of peace continues to inspire.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The legendary British comedian, actor, and writer John Cleese, co-founder of Monty Python and star of Fawlty Towers, celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: Comedy Icon's Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th birthday to the utterly brilliant John Cleese! From Python to Fawlty Towers, a true master of comedy.
